title: Lenient Spawns
description: Allows mobs to spawn on slabs and other non-full blocks as long as there is a full block below it
body:
#
Behold, my stuff ### Lenient Spawns In short, all it does is check if the block below a spawn attempt is valid when a spawn attempt fails. In practice this means that mobs will be able to spawn on blocks such as bottom slabs, anvils, glass, etc, as long as the block underneath of it is a block which normally allows spawns, such as stone. This is mostly intended to combat reduced spawn rates of mobs caused by mods such as [Countered Terrain Slabs](https://modrinth.com/mod/countereds-terrain-slabs). ### Lenient Spawns and Neoforge! Playing on Neoforge but want to use Lenient Spawns? Look no further than [Sinytra](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sinytra-connector)! Lenient Spawns has full compatability with Sinytra for playing on Neoforge. [![Milkev Gaming Ko-fi Support Page](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7b86091251537403a7244affd5494198a163450.jpeg)](https://ko-fi.com/milkevgaming) #### Programmed using IntelliJ
